---
title: "The Rev. James Hemery Janvrin"
---

## The Rev. James Hemery Janvrin

**Dates:** (b. 1818/9)

### Description

chaplain to the Winchester County Hospital

### Biography

Mentioned with his wife (15 March 1852);  but hard to trace, probably because he was born in Jersey.

### Letters

- Letter from March 15th [1852[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
